title: Exploding Kittens: Minecraft Edition.
description: This Resource Pack Adds Loads Of Cards Inspired By The Exploding Kittens Card Game!
body:
Hey There! Have you ever wanted a card game in Minecraft? Yes or No, It is Here!!

The Famous Game, Exploding Kittens has been adapted and modified into this Resource Pack!

The Pack Contains A LOT of cards to play with so it would be beneficial to have played EK before


All cards are turned around to make it more interesting. To see their faces, place them in your offhand.

The way to obtain these cards is through renaming paper to the following system:
- KC?.cardname
  - -> KC - then put some character there after it (spaces work too)
  - -> .cardname - put the name of the card. Some have been shortened and modified. I am working on a 
                       wiki for it soon.

The card box is a Shulker box or Bundle renamed to CardBox
The hat is a carved pumpkin renamed to K?.TowerPower (? - means any character)
The stack of cards is paper renamed to KC?.Stack

Happy Playing!

PS: The Command to access these in creative mode/ operator mode is in the pastebin:
     https://pastebin.com/J2LZnidR
